title: Review: sync_guard + 7 commits
notes:
Maintainer risk: LOW — the critical issues (dead code, wrong doc) are purely internal and don't affect users. The MAX_SYNC_LAG doc is the only user-visible risk. The core payment stack is solid.
Confidence: 92% chance of no missed bug. The sync_guard logic is simple arithmetic; the tests cover all branches including the reorg edge case (chain_tip < scan_tip). Uncertainty: happy_path payment test is still params-gated and skips in CI without sapling-spend.params.
